Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Scott Talkov, Esq. for Plaintiff Freda Leeper
Skye Langs, Esq. for Defendant Portia L Osborne
Vaness Ing, Esq. for Defendant Jonathan Powell

In re: DEFENDANT PORTIA OSBORNE Motion To Order Escrow;

Hearing held.
Arguments heard.

Upon conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission.

After all matters were heard from today's calendar;
The Court now rules as follows:

Defendant's motion to order Escrow is DENIED. The statute does not provide for an escrow or any conditions associated with the requirement that "electing contenants shall pay their apportioned price into the court." It has come to the Court's attention that the Notice of Entry of order on a motion heard on August 14, 2025 was not sent to the parties until August 26, 2025.
At the hearing, actual notice of the deadline to make the payment was confirmed. Therefore, the Court modifies its tentative ruling, finds that the notice under CCP 874.317 was sufficient.

Trial date of November 17, 2025 remains.
